strategy.title: Continuous Improvements
strategy.vision: Every product I build gets better on its own, every day. I spend my time having ideas and giving feedback. The system handles the rest.
strategy.where_to_play: Solo builder (Michael) running 5-10 personal products, each with workstream-level continuous improvement loops, orchestrated via Discord and the build system pipeline.

existingProducts: goal-md — Generalizes AutoResearch to any domain with constructed metrics
Atlassian product agents — 4 agents for discovery, enterprise PM-bound
trends: The Loopy Era — continuous self-improvement loops
gaps: No product connects capture → sparring → execution → review
No domain scouting + backlog + execution together
No Discord-based async capture with eval-mapped hypotheses

structuralDecisions.goalMd: Human-owned strategic direction per workstream. Changes monthly/bi-weekly.
structuralDecisions.claudeMd: Wiring file. Points to goal.md, evals, backlog.
structuralDecisions.evalsMd: Lives wherever stage 3 put them. Never copied.
structuralDecisions.noDuplication: goal.md never contains evals. CLAUDE.md never contains strategy.
structuralDecisions.workstreamOnboarding: First step of this product. Agent proposes 2-3 fracture planes, builder picks.

candidates.name: The Native Loop
candidates.coreIdea: Everything runs inside Claude Code. Discord Channels for capture. Scheduled agent for execution. Supabase for data. Next.js dashboard on Vercel.

candidates.name: The Hybrid
candidates.coreIdea: Chat SDK Discord bot for capture. Scheduled agent for execution. Same Supabase + dashboard stack.

candidates.name: The Lean Loop
candidates.coreIdea: Channels + scheduled agent + generated HTML. No database. Everything is files.

selection.howToWin: The only system where a sentence in Discord becomes a tested, measured, shipped improvement by morning — with zero infrastructure outside Claude Code, Vercel, and Supabase.

no_gos: No duplication of evals in goal.md
constraints: Claude Code Channels must support async Discord listening
Scheduled remote agent requires Claude Code Max
Each workstream needs evals from pipeline stage 3
